scripts.sim:csv: mkdir -p dist && tsx src/index.ts matchup --csv > dist/matchup.csv && tsx src/index.ts role --csv > dist/role.csv && tsx src/index.ts team --csv > dist/team.csv && tsx src/index.ts ability --csv > dist/ability.csv
scripts.sim:meta:csv: mkdir -p dist && tsx src/index.ts meta --csv > dist/meta.csv
scripts.sim:quick: mkdir -p dist && tsx src/index.ts matchup --csv --trials 20 > dist/matchup.csv && tsx src/index.ts role --csv --trials 200 > dist/role.csv && tsx src/index.ts team --csv --trials 2000 > dist/team.csv && tsx src/index.ts ability --csv --trials 2000 > dist/ability.csv
